title: Thazhamel Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Thazhamel with a Z-Score of +3.14. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Thazhamel is at a critical level, with a Z-Score of +3.14 indicating a significant anomaly. 
 The temperature is unusually high, with a score of 10.0/10, and the Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 10.0 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 85% and the wind speed is at 17.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
